purpose.statement: Base has purpose: preserve family continuity, publish public proofs, make reputation replayable, and keep authority false.
purpose.plain_language: Average Dad building public receipts so family, work, and reputation can be checked without trusting the storyteller.
purpose.base_future_thesis: The future of Base reputation should be replayable by ordinary families, builders, and observers without requiring centralized permission or narrative trust.

average_dad_layer.definition: Average Dad is the human-scale purpose layer: parent, builder, witness, and continuity operator. It is not a legal status, credential, office, or authority claim.

base_reputation_context.rule: Base and Zora references are purpose and reputation pointers until independently replayed. No ownership or activity verification is asserted here.

versioning.upgrade_rule: Future versions must preserve prior receipts and mark all new claims as declared, verified, diverged, or pending.

required_invariants: authority must remain false unless a future artifact explicitly defines a lawful and replayable authority boundary
promotion must remain false until proof receipts replace placeholders
identity pointers must not become ownership claims without independent receipts
Zora, ENS, Base ENS, and family claims must remain separable
external auditors must be able to classify failures as MATCH, DIVERGE, or INCOMPLETE
